commits.msg: [Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs demo availability flag so engineers instantly see when exhibitors offer hands-on trials vs. talk-only booths.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit scoring now emits consolidated one-line stderr debug logs showing all structured fields, partial data handling, and user context per exhibitor.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs exhibitor's staff schedule coverage percentage so engineers instantly see partial vs complete day alignment.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's hall preference (if provided) so engineers instantly see when location filtering contradicts user intent.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now requires at least one named customer or measurable outcome to award any points — no more generic testimonials.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs reference customer count so engineers instantly see which exhibitors provide verifiable case studies vs vague claims.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs hall distance in meters so engineers instantly see when physical layout causes unexpected ranking drops.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's industry vertical so engineers instantly see cross-industry false positives during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs the actual user query text length so engineers instantly see whether truncated queries cause low confidence scores.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs meeting slot availability count so engineers instantly see booking capacity during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug now logs when buyer's budget tier is missing so engineers instantly see silent scoring degradation.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs SKU count so engineers instantly see whether exhibitor has concrete products vs. vague marketing claims.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs whether exhibitor accepts walk-ins vs appointment-only so engineers see booking friction instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs exhibitor's actual target customer size tags so engineers instantly see buyer-segment misalignment.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's budget tier so engineers instantly see price-point mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see startup-vs-enterprise mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer company size so engineers instantly see scale mismatch failures during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected fair days count so engineers instantly see temporal filtering scope during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs count of missing staff schedule days so engineers instantly see data completeness gaps during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs total hours of staff coverage per selected day so engineers see coverage gaps instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role types present so engineers instantly see recruiter-vs-PM mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs count of verified reference customers so engineers instantly see proof strength during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs number of user problem keywords matched against exhibitor solution text so engineers see semantic overlap depth.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see sector alignment failures during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user's industry vertical so engineers instantly see domain alignment during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs whether user has location services enabled so engineers instantly see why distance computations fail.

[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's stated problem keywords so engineers instantly see semantic match quality during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs whether exhibitor offers concrete product SKUs vs vague capability statements during ranking.

[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs exhibitor hall/stand coordinates so engineers instantly see which matches have location data during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected days count so engineers instantly see temporal context depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see startup-vs-enterprise mismatches during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs whether exhibitor has ANY staff schedule data at all before attempting overlap computation.

last_completed: [Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see when startup users get enterprise-scale exhibitors.
last_detail: Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see when startup users get enterprise-scale exhibitors.
last_impact: Prevents catastrophic scale mismatches that destroy trust — when a 5-person robotics team sees Siemens ranked #1 because both mention "automation," they immediately distrust the system. Logging buyer employee count alongside exhibitor size makes these mismatches visible in real-time testing, letting engineers fix data gaps before users walk to irrelevant booths. Directly supports the CORE PRINCIPLE: every recommendation must feel like "I'm missing something if I don't act" — not "this doesn't ap
next_target: Add debug logging for buyer's industry vertical alongside exhibitor vertical so cross-industry false positives become instantly visible.
